description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines two stages: test and release. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm ci then npm test on every pipeline run. In the release stage add a release job that runs only on the master branch (excluding tags) and executes npm ci, exports VERSION from package.json, runs npm run publish:vsce, and posts a new GitLab tag via curl with the PRIVATE-TOKEN, piping the response to npx alola. Also in the release stage add a version job that runs on all branches except master and tags, exports VERSION from package.json, echoes a check message, and uses curl to query the GitLab tags API, exiting with error if the tag already exists. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or services.
